AI-powered SaaS platform; contributed to product and go-to-market initiatives that converted three pilot customers into paying accounts.

  • Drove architecture decisions across frontend systems and workflow orchestration layers.
  • Defined scalable patterns for state management and API integration across multiple product surfaces.
  • Collaborated across frontend, backend, and DevOps teams to maintain cohesive system design.
  • Improved frontend performance via SSR/ISR optimization, code-splitting, and caching strategies.
  • Built analytics dashboards with Recharts to support real-time visibility and decision-making.

Accelerated product development and contributed to platform outcomes that supported $50M+ in funding momentum in 2024.

  • Built and improved core product workflows supporting therapy access and member experience.
  • Strengthened data protection practices with encryption, access controls, and audit-ready processes.
  • Supported matching and personalization initiatives with ML-informed profile and preference workflows.
  • Helped deliver employer-facing reporting that communicated measurable program impact.
  • Collaborated with cross-functional teams to ship features quickly while maintaining product quality.

Played a key role in product development across scheduling, operations, and performance-critical workflows.

  • Improved end-to-end application performance through query optimization, caching, and concurrency tuning.
  • Helped define clearer engineering review practices to improve release confidence.
  • Worked directly with stakeholders to translate user feedback into actionable product updates.
  • Simplified complex technical concepts for cross-functional teams and non-technical audiences.
  • Contributed to trustworthy product experiences for healthcare operations teams.

Developed and evolved healthcare product experiences focused on improving access and operational clarity.

  • Delivered feature sets tailored to providers, payers, and patients across multiple product surfaces.
  • Integrated analytics and AI-oriented capabilities into healthcare workflow experiences.
  • Improved UX communication with clearer language and supporting visual content.
  • Supported trust and compliance goals through security-forward implementation decisions.
  • Mentored and supported two junior engineers across delivery and technical growth.
